---
title: "Interactive Demo"
format: revealjs
revealjs-plugins:
  - editable
filters:
  - editable
  - arrows
---

## Try Modify Mode

Nothing on this slide is pre-marked. Click **Modify** in the menu bar, then click any element below to make it editable on the fly.

This paragraph, the list, and the table are all activatable.

- First item
- Second item
- Third item

| Column A | Column B |
|----------|----------|
| 1        | 2        |
| 3        | 4        |

## Try Moving This Image

This image was pre-marked with the `.editable` class in the source (`![](image.png){.editable width="200"}`), so it is active immediately — drag it to reposition.

![](image.png){.editable width="200"}

## Edit This Text

This text block was pre-marked with `::: {.editable}` in the source, so it is active immediately. Click the edit button to open the rich text editor.

::: {.editable}
**Try editing me!**

You can make text *italic*, **bold**, or ~~strikethrough~~.
:::

## Multiple Elements

Both blocks below were pre-marked with `::: {.editable}` in the source.

::: {.editable}
Element 1
:::

::: {.editable}
Element 2
:::
